poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

instanceId.description: Stable identifier of the agent or runner instance that accepted the job.

instanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the instance.

jobId.description: Provider-specific identifier for the accepted job.

queueDepth.description: Queue depth observed when the job was accepted, if available.

queueWaitMs.description: Time in milliseconds that the job waited in queue before acceptance, if available.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this lifecycle event, such as workflow/run identifiers or pipeline context.
